name: Candied Pepitas (Pumpkin Seeds)
instructions: In a medium pot on induction burner on medium heat, add sugar
Cook for 5-8 minutes until golden and melted. Do not stir, just tilt the pot. Stirring will cause it to crystallize.
Add the pumpkin seeds into pot, mix with spatula, and then pour onto a parchment paper lining a sheet tray. Use a rubber spatula to remove.
Allow to cool on parchment or refrigerate to cool completely.
While the pot is hot, add water to boil it and clean the caramel off. Do not let it cool or it will be difficult to clean.
Once cool and dry, peel off and move to a Vitamix or food processor to blend until fine
Label, date, and keep covered, air-tight.
